title: Get started
text: echoverseTemplate skeleton R package serves starting point creating new modules within echoverse suite genomic fine-mapping tools. provides: ready-made package structure following Bioconductor conventions. Internal utility functions (messager, stopper, message_parallel) consistent messaging across echoverse modules. Pre-configured CI/CD via rworkflows.

title: Get started
text: create new echoverse module template: Copy fork repository. Rename package (update DESCRIPTION, NAMESPACE, vignettes, etc.). Add exported functions R/. Document roxygen2 rebuild NAMESPACE.

title: Get started
text: package includes three internal helpers shared across echoverse modules: messager() – Conditionally print messages, support parallel contexts. stopper() – Conditionally raise stop errors. message_parallel() – Send messages console within parallel processes.

title: Echoverse Module: echoversePackageTitle
text: Brian M. Schilder, Bioinformatician IIRaj LabDepartment Neuroscience, Icahn School Medicine Mount Sinai

title: Message parallel — message_parallel
text: Send messages console even within parallel processes

title: Print messages — messager
text: Conditionally print messages.  Allows developers easily control verbosity functions,  meet Bioconductor requirements dictate message  must first stored variable passing message.

title: Print messages — messager
text: v Whether print messages . parallel Whether enable message print wrapped parallelised functions.

title: Stop messages — stopper
text: Conditionally print stop messages. Allows developers easily control verbosity functions,  meet Bioconductor requirements dictate stop message  must first stored variable passing stop.
